name: Rust Beetle
description: A corrosive Grounded 2 beetle that uses acid and persistent damage to control space.
behavior: It holds its position and punishes any target that tries to get too close.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks the player on sight and uses its spray to cover the front.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually ignores other enemies unless they get trapped inside its zone.
strategy: Attack it from the flanks or after its frontal spray. Do not walk straight into its acid.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 40. Close-Range Spray: 30. Ranged Shot: 45. Upwards Shot: 45.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to punish players who stay too close.

abilities.name: Close-Range Spray
abilities.description: It unloads acid in front of itself to cover the nearby ground with lingering damage.

abilities.name: Ranged Shot
abilities.description: It spits a corrosive projectile to stop you from getting comfortable at mid-range.

abilities.name: Upwards Shot
abilities.description: It fires acid upward at an angle to hit elevated paths or platforms.
